en_title: Call of Duty: Modern Warfare 4 Beta Dates Confirmed
cn_title: 《使命召唤：现代战争4》Beta测试日期确认
subtitle: 8月21日开测

paragraphs.en: Activision and Infinity Ward have confirmed dates for the upcoming Call of Duty: Modern Warfare 4 beta tests across PC, Nintendo, PlayStation, and Xbox devices.
paragraphs.cn: 动视与Infinity Ward确认了《使命召唤：现代战争4》在PC、任天堂、PlayStation和XBOX设备上的Beta测试日期。

paragraphs.en: The team behind this year's first-person shooter installment revealed its playtest plans with a blog post on their website . Call of Duty: Modern Warfare 4 players who pre-ordered on PC, PS5, and Xbox Series X | S can dive in first when beta early access runs from August 21 – 25, with Nintendo Switch 2 joining the mix when the open beta takes place between August 28 – September 1.
paragraphs.cn: 团队通过官网博客公布测试计划。预购PC、PS5和XBOX Series X|S版的玩家可在8月21日至25日抢先体验；8月28日至9月1日公开测试期间，Nintendo Switch 2也会加入。

paragraphs.en: It's all set to truly kick off immediately after the Call of Duty Next presentation comes to an end August 21. A brief description for this year's event promises "live gameplay, an in-depth briefing on the lineup of content coming to Modern Warfare 4's Multiplayer, developer insights, and new reveals ahead of the beta."
paragraphs.cn: 测试将在8月21日「Call of Duty Next」发布会结束后立即正式启动。活动简介承诺带来「实机演示、《现代战争4》多人模式内容阵容的深入说明、开发者见解，以及Beta前的新消息」。

paragraphs.en: Exactly which weapons, Operators, maps, and modes will be featured in the beta have yet to be revealed, but Activision and Infinity Ward did give players a taste of what's to come. Of Call of Duty: Modern Warfare 4's launch content, the post promises 19 different weapons, 3v3 skirmishes, tanks, Kill Block, and more.
paragraphs.cn: Beta具体包含哪些武器、干员、地图和模式尚未公布，但动视与Infinity Ward预告了部分内容：首发将有19种武器、3对3遭遇战、坦克、「Kill Block」等。

paragraphs.en: "Get ready to drop into multiple Multiplayer maps and modes," the post said, "choosing from a wide selection of brand-new Operators, including all the Vault Edition Operators for players who pre-order the Vault Edition, and unlocking as many as 19 different weapons before deploying into everything from small-scale 3v3 skirmishes to massive tactical battles featuring tanks and more. Test your mettle across new and returning modes, from Search & Destroy to the brand-new Kill Block, plus the Training Mobility Course."
paragraphs.cn: 博客写道：「准备进入多张多人地图和多种模式，从大量全新干员中选择；预购金库版的玩家还可使用全部金库版干员。玩家最多可解锁19种武器，随后投入从小规模3对3遭遇战到包含坦克的大型战术战斗。你可在搜索与摧毁等回归模式、全新Kill Block以及机动训练场中检验实力。」

paragraphs.en: The post added that Call of Duty: Modern Warfare 4 beta players will be able to build loadouts with the new Gunny system . More information on the upcoming tests will be revealed "soon."
paragraphs.cn: 文章还表示，玩家可利用新的Gunny系统配置装备。更多测试信息将「很快」公布。

paragraphs.en: Elsewhere in the post is confirmation for what the Vault Edition unlocks during the beta, with pre-order purchasers able to use Operators Price, Valeria, Ghost, and Blix, for example. Meanwhile, Switch 2 users can now officially look forward to locking in their pre-order starting August 26 as Call of Duty returns to Nintendo platforms for the first time in years.
paragraphs.cn: 博客也确认了金库版在Beta期间的解锁内容，预购者可使用Price、Valeria、Ghost和Blix等干员。随着《使命召唤》多年来首次回归任天堂平台，Switch 2用户可从8月26日起预购。

paragraphs.en: Call of Duty: Modern Warfare 4 launches for PC, Switch 2, PS5, and Xbox Series X | S October 23, 2026. For more, you can check out IGN's first look at the new tactical SUV designed by Aston Martin and developed by Infinity Ward .
paragraphs.cn: 《使命召唤：现代战争4》将于2026年10月23日登陆PC、Switch 2、PS5和XBOX Series X|S。IGN还介绍了由阿斯顿·马丁设计、Infinity Ward开发的新型战术SUV。

opus_summary: 《使命召唤：现代战争4》将于8月21日至25日为预购玩家开启抢先Beta，8月28日至9月1日举行公开测试并加入Nintendo Switch 2。正式版10月23日发售。
